sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34015" key="e)mbola/dhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβολ-άδην</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐμβάλλω</etym>) <sense id="n34015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fitting in</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐ. ἐστραμμέναι ἀλλήλῃσι</foreign> prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:411" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">411</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμβ-</foreign> cod. Leid.).</sense> </entryFree>
